symptom: a firm breast lump felt on and off for years that never really changes size
hook: a round dense lump was packed with coarse clumps of calcium that looked exactly like popcorn
whatYouSee: A round dense lump packed with coarse clumped calcifications that look exactly like a piece of popcorn.
whyItMatters: A benign breast lump slowly calcified over years as its blood supply faded and it is one of the most reassuring patterns a mammogram can show.
treatment: Nothing needs doing because the popcorn pattern is classic and benign so the lump is just followed at routine checks.
takeaway: Not every lump is a warning. Some just turn into popcorn.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a firm breast lump felt on and off for years that never really changes size.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a round dense lump was packed with coarse clumps of calcium that looked exactly like popcorn.

Case #84 🩻 Difficulty 2/5

Medics: your diagnosis?

Everyone else: Does that lump remind you of a snack food?

Answer in 45 min 👀 no spoilers from me till then
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Calcified fibroadenoma

👀 What you see:
A round dense lump packed with coarse clumped calcifications that look exactly like a piece of popcorn.

🦴 Why it matters:
A benign breast lump slowly calcified over years as its blood supply faded and it is one of the most reassuring patterns a mammogram can show.

💊 Treatment:

Nothing needs doing because the popcorn pattern is classic and benign so the lump is just followed at routine checks.
generated.ctaText:
If these weird X-rays have made you learn something or laugh or question reality for a few seconds 😭

I put 20 of the most bizarre cases into a digital PDF.

And if you'd like to support the page I'd genuinely appreciate it 🙏

xray.mednoteslab.com

laypersonQuestion: Does that lump remind you of a snack food?
seedHint: Look at the center of that dense mass and ask yourself if calcium can have a texture
